Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. More precise elevation data for GraphHopper routing engine 44 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Two studies in compiler optimisations 81 upvotes, 7 comments
  3. Quantization from the Ground Up 252 upvotes, 47 comments
  4. The EU still wants to scan your private messages and photos 1156 upvotes, 307 comments
  5. Personal Encyclopedias 158 upvotes, 39 comments
  6. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 627 upvotes, 195 comments
  7. My DIY FPGA board can run Quake II 154 upvotes, 49 comments
  8. Show HN: A plain-text cognitive architecture for Claude Code 98 upvotes, 31 comments
  9. False claims in a widely-cited paper 276 upvotes, 108 comments
  10. Obsolete Sounds 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  11. Thoughts on slowing the fuck down 854 upvotes, 387 comments
  12. Shell Tricks That Make Life Easier (and Save Your Sanity) 80 upvotes, 27 comments
  13. Swift 6.3 32 upvotes, 8 comments
  14. The Cassandra of 'The Machine' 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  15. Earthquake scientists reveal how overplowing weakens soil at experimental farm 164 upvotes, 69 comments
  16. Government agencies buy commercial data about Americans in bulk 51 upvotes, 20 comments
  17. Apple randomly closes bug reports unless you "verify" the bug remains unfixed 403 upvotes, 227 comments
  18. The truth that haunts the Ramones: 'They sold more T-shirts than records' 113 upvotes, 55 comments
  19. 90% of Claude-linked output going to GitHub repos w <2 stars 284 upvotes, 173 comments
  20. The Last Contract: William T. Vollmann's Battle to Publish an Epic (2025) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. ARC-AGI-3 392 upvotes, 261 comments
  22. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 348 upvotes, 267 comments
  23. Show HN: Optio – Orchestrate AI coding agents in K8s to go from ticket to PR 53 upvotes, 31 comments
  24. Maxell MXCP-P100 – wireless cassette player 21 upvotes, 9 comments
  25. Show HN: Robust LLM Extractor for Websites in TypeScript 41 upvotes, 32 comments
  26. What came after the 486? 25 upvotes, 17 comments
  27. Niche Museums 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Buying a retro game console 12 upvotes, 6 comments
  29. Jury finds Meta liable in case over child sexual exploitation on its platforms 389 upvotes, 482 comments
  30. Ashby (YC W19) Is Hiring Engineers Who Make Product Decisions 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 6:00pm, 26 March 2026. Source here.
